title: わたし、本気でがんばる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days after her friend's outburst in the
shopping district, Haru Urara's peppy self is still
nowhere in sight... Instead, a gloomy cloud seems
to follow her wherever she goes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until one day, I spot Urara while walking by the
river.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The sunset is so pretty today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is staring absentmindedly at the
sunset. Like I thought, she seems a bit down in
the dumps. I start to think of what to say to her,
when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rice? What's up?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I, uh, well... Um, I've actually been following you
from behind for a while...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, really? I didn't even notice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry! You just looked so sad...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I'd probably be of no help, but... Do you wanna
talk?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I didn't really get it, so I didn't say
anything.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What does it mean to take running seriously?
Can't I just have fun?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I get that I have to do something different, but I
just don't know what!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Every time I think about what I should do, my
head feels like it's gonna explode! Like BOOM!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well, how about we just stay calm for a
minute...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, I know it's not the same thing, but I've had
people get angry at me before.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I won in a race that someone else cared really
deeply about.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I heard her sigh in disappointment. There was so
much sadness in it... A lot of people were really
upset about the results.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Rice...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...But I worked hard.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Even though all of their disappointment could've
really discouraged me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I kept running and kept winning. And before I
knew it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: More people started to congratulate me.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Then that means I just need to keep trying?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: If I do that, will people stop being sad?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
My friend said she didn't want to compete with
me... But if I keep going, will she change her
mind?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Urara, you said you wanted to win before,
right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wanna win! You can't win if you don't compete,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I want everyone to see me finally win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If you still feel that way then you're fine just as
you are.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
As long as you keep that dream close to your
heart, everything will turn out just fine.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? But that sounds hard!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I don't think I'll come up with a
better idea even if I try for a billion years, so I'll
just trust you, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you... If anyone can do it, you can, Urara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After talking with Rice Shower, Haru Urara seems
to go back to her normal self.
